about.feature.delivery.body: We guarantee delivery within 24 hours. When we are online, orders are often handled much faster.
about.feature.delivery.title: 24-hour delivery
about.feature.stock.body: When we list ships or CCUs for sale, they come from our own stock. We are not matching you with an unknown outside seller.
about.feature.stock.title: Self-operated stock
about.feature.support.body: If you want to ask before buying or need help after payment, you can reach us through <discord>Discord</discord> or <ticket>support tickets</ticket>.
about.feature.support.title: Talk to us directly
about.feature.tools.body: Citizens' Hub started as a free Star Citizen tool site. CCU planning, price history, hangar tools, and order tracking are here to help you make a better decision before spending money.
about.feature.tools.title: Free tools first
about.heading: About Us
about.hero.body1: Citizens' Hub is a free Star Citizen tool site. We also provide self-operated ships and CCUs for players who want to save time and money.
about.hero.body2: Use the tools to plan your fleet, compare upgrade paths, and check prices. If you decide to buy from us, the items listed in our market are handled by us directly.
about.hero.title: A free Star Citizen tool site, with self-operated ships and CCUs available.
about.metaDescription: Citizens' Hub is a free Star Citizen tool site with self-operated ships and CCUs available for purchase, helping players save time and money.
about.registration.description: It does not replace actual service, but you should not have to guess who is behind the storefront.
about.registration.linkDescription: Citizens' Hub is operated by PARAVIA LIMITED. We keep the business registration document here for you to check.
about.registration.previewAlt: Business registration document for PARAVIA LIMITED
about.registration.title: You can check the company behind the store.
about.section.capabilitiesDescription: We keep the tools and the store in one place because they serve the same goal: helping you spend less time guessing and more time making the right choice.
about.section.capabilitiesTitle: Tools are free. Market items are self-operated.
about.stat.delivery.label: Delivered within 24 hours, faster when we are online
about.stat.stock.label: Not outside seller listings
about.stat.support.label: Talk to us directly if something comes up
about.subtitle: A free Star Citizen tool site with self-operated ships and CCUs available for purchase.
about.workflow.aftercare.body: If you want an update, have a delivery question, or need help after the order, keep using Discord or support tickets to reach us.
about.workflow.aftercare.title: You can keep talking to us
about.workflow.checkout.body: Once you choose an item, checkout happens on the site. Item details, price, and order status stay on the page.
about.workflow.checkout.title: You place the order on the site
about.workflow.description: You should not need to negotiate in private messages or hunt through several places for order records. We keep the order, payment, and follow-up path as close to the site as possible.
about.workflow.fulfillment.body: We process the order as quickly as we can and guarantee delivery within 24 hours.
about.workflow.fulfillment.title: We deliver it
about.workflow.inventory.body: Items available on the page are treated as our own stock, not something we need to hunt down from another seller after you pay.
about.workflow.inventory.title: We prepare the stock first
about.workflow.title: You order on the site, and we handle the order from there.
